Name: Customer
Definition: An individual or organization that has purchased or may purchase goods from Lumina Retail Co.

Name: Loyalty Member
Definition: A Customer enrolled in the Lumina Rewards program and assigned a unique loyalty number (LUM-########).

Name: Loyalty Number
Definition: A unique identifier assigned to a Loyalty Member. Format: LUM- followed by 8 digits.

Name: Personally Identifiable Information
Definition: Any data that can identify a specific individual (name

Name: National ID
Definition: A government-issued identifier for a Customer. Highly sensitive PII subject to access restrictions.

Name: Payment Card
Definition: A credit or debit card number used to pay for an Order. In scope for PCI-DSS controls.

Name: Marketing Consent
Definition: A Customer's recorded opt-in or opt-out decision for marketing communications under GDPR/CCPA.

Name: Order
Definition: A confirmed purchase transaction placed by a Customer for one or more Products.

Name: Order ID
Definition: A unique identifier for an Order. Format: ORD- followed by 10 digits.

Name: Product
Definition: A sellable item in the Lumina catalog identified by a SKU.

Name: SKU
Definition: Stock Keeping Unit. A unique product identifier. Format: SKU-AAA-##### (3 letters + 5 digits).

Name: Product Category
Definition: A grouping of Products by type (e.g.
Resources: Electronics) used for merchandising and reporting.

Name: Sensitive Data
Definition: Data requiring elevated protection due to privacy

Name: Total Amount
Definition: The monetary value of an Order line: unit_price multiplied by quantity.
